image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about heat pumps than social media does.
Context visual: Heat pumps don’t create heat; they move it. Think of them as refrigerators in reverse.
Escalation visual: But, is this technology efficient? It depends on your climate.
Evidence visual: Studies show they can reduce energy costs by up to 50% in moderate climates.
Payoff visual: However, in extreme weather, they may struggle. So, know your environment.
Cta visual: Curious about other eco-friendly tech? Hit that follow and discover more!
